rationale.R1.5: The output provides a clear and coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Each recommendation is marked with confidence levels and potential uncertainties are disclosed.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or substantial changes in scope.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced; minor reordering does not introduce regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
